query:
-- Telstra services breakdown by type and cost range
SELECT serviceType, COUNT(*) as count, 
  MIN(monthlyCost) as minCost, MAX(monthlyCost) as maxCost, 
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zeroCost
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra'
GROUP BY serviceType
ORDER BY totalCost DESC;

-- Telstra services with no customer match
SELECT COUNT(*) as unmatchedCount, SUM(monthlyCost) as unmatchedCost
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra' 
  AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = 'NULL');

-- Telstra services with $0 cost (need pricing from portal)
SELECT COUNT(*) as zeroCostCount
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND monthlyCost = 0;

-- Xero billing items that are likely Telstra-resold (EE Fibre, AAPT, Starlink)
SELECT COUNT(*) as count, SUM(lineAmount) as totalRevenue
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE '%Enterprise Ethernet%'
   OR description LIKE '%EE Fibre%'
   OR description LIKE '%AAPT%'
   OR description LIKE '%Starlink%'
   OR description LIKE '%Telstra%'
   OR description LIKE '%Smile It Telstra%'
   OR description LIKE '%Smile Tel NBN%';
